title: ActionabilityResult
description: B1 — Output of the classifier node. Records whether a detected smell is worth attempting to fix.

rationale.description: Mandatory human-readable explanation of why this label was chosen.

confidence.description: Classifier confidence in the label (0.0 = no confidence, 1.0 = certain).

no_op_acceptable.description: True only when label is non_actionable or needs_review. An actionable smell that produces no edits is a failure.

caveats.description: Smell-specific warnings surfaced to the planner and verifier.
